MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAIDIN CONSULTING GROUP, LLC HEARING SET FOR APR-07-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,841.35 FILED BY JAIDIN CONSULTING GROUP, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BED BATH & BEYOND, INC.; BED BATH & BEYOND, LLC.;- AND BED BATH & BEYOND OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. MBH ARCHITECTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
VENUE CHALLENGE FILED BY BED, BATH & BEYOND; PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE TO PLTF FILED
IF DEFT'S CHECK TO PLFT CLEARS THE BANK, THE JUDGMENT WILL BE VACATED AND THE ACTION WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BED BATH & BEYOND, INC.; BED BATH & BEYOND, LLC.;- AND BED BATH & BEYOND OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. MBH ARCHITECTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT IS VACATED AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS. THE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT BED BATH & BEYOND, INC.; BED BATH & BEYOND, LLC.;-
DEFT'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT IS VACATED AS TO ALL DEFTS. THE ENTIRE ACTION IS DISM W/PREJ TO ALL DEFTS.PARTIES SETTLED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAIDIN CONSULTING GROUP, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BED BATH & BEYOND, INC.; BED BATH & BEYOND, LLC.;- AND BED BATH & BEYOND OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. MBH ARCHITECTS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,110.00, MBH ARCHITECTS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY BED BATH & BEYOND, NOT THE PLAINTIFF.
COLLECTION ON THE JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 1/7/00 IS STAYED.
